name: Welcome to Planet E1d0r4d0!
short_description: Welcome to Planet E1d0r4d0 is a narrative-driven management sim and side-scrolling hunting adventure about a young girl searching for the meaning of existence at the edge of the cosmos. In this chaotic, lawless universe, even immortality feels devastatingly fragile.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Planet E1d0r4d0! On a lonely planet at the edge of known space, a late-night diner hidden deep in abandoned mines awaits your arrival. This pixel-art RPG combines management simulation with side-scrolling dungeon exploration. Hunt exotic ingredients in underground expeditions by day, serve customers and unlock storylines by night - all while earning your survival and uncovering the mystery behind your sister's death.

Take Over Your Sister's Late-Night Diner

You are Louise, a girl from dying Earth who once shared everything with your sister. Three years ago, she left for the legendary resource world "E1d0r4d0" seeking work - and vanished completely. Then came her final letter - a farewell carrying one last request.

She's asked you to travel to this desolate frontier world and inherit "Habitable Zone," the mysterious diner she ran in the mine's deepest chambers. Here, survival is just the beginning - the real truth lies buried beneath the planet's surface.

Hunt by Day, Collect the Extraordinary

Extraordinary cuisine demands extraordinary ingredients. E1d0r4d0's underground networks harbor creatures beyond imagination. During daylight, you'll plunge into the planet's belly, navigating treacherous caverns rich with both danger and opportunity. Hunt the bizarre native life forms and transform them into culinary masterpieces.

Your ingredient hunts may turn deadly - the prey might become the predator! But death is merely an inconvenience in this age of consciousness backup technology. Upload your mind to the machines, and when your body fails, you'll awaken in a fresh clone, ready to try again. Go ahead - embrace death a few times and see what happens!

Serve by Night, Touch Their Souls

When darkness falls, your late-night diner comes alive. Using your sister's recipe notes and the day's hard-won ingredients, you'll craft dishes that stir memories for your eclectic clientele, awakening their long-buried pasts.

Your patrons arrive from across the galaxy - different worlds, different lives, each carrying tales both wondrous and suspicious. Through these encounters, you'll slowly assemble clues about your sister's disappearance and the experiences that led to her fate. Just remember: keep the business profitable and pay your corporate landlords on time, or they'll seize the diner without mercy!

Unearth E1d0r4d0's Secrets

Your explorations will uncover echo recording devices left by vanished expedition teams, preserving accounts of the strange phenomena they encountered below. As you venture deeper, unsettling patterns emerge - these underground spaces feel disturbingly familiar. Have you been here before? Who are the two women whose conversations haunt your dreams each night? What earth-shattering truths lie hidden in this planet's core...

Game Features

  • Pixel Art Style

  • Side-Scrolling 2D Exploration: Navigate underground labyrinths, harvest alien ingredients, and battle otherworldly creatures

  • Management Simulation: Operate your late-night establishment, follow recipes to satisfy customers, generate income

  • Fragmentary Storytelling: Piece together the world's mysteries through dialogue, recordings, and environmental narrative

  • Dark Sci-Fi Comedy: Experience humanity's absurd decline against the backdrop of cosmic expansion

supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese*, Japanese*, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
